title: Taxi Dubrovnik to Murter | Fixed €535 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Dubrovnik to Murter. Fixed €535 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.
keywords: taxi dubrovnik to murter, transfer dubrovnik to murter, dubrovnik to murter taxi, dubrovnik to murter transfer

schema.name: Taxi Dubrovnik to Murter
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Dubrovnik to Murter, 535 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Dubrovnik to Murter, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 1070 euros.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Dubrovnik to Murter?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 535 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, with tolls, fuel and luggage included. A return trip is 1070.

mainEntity.name: Is the transfer private or shared?

acceptedAnswer.text: Every transfer is private and door to door, in a Škoda Superb. No vehicle sharing and no extra stops unless you ask for them.

mainEntity.name: Can you stop along the way?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. On the longer routes I am happy to stop for a coffee, a photo or a quick sight. Just let me know when booking.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup time. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
